commands.review_summary:
The PR changes webchat chatRunId reconciliation, sessions.changed cleanup, related UI controller tests, and adds two Matrix dependencies to the root package manifest.

PR surface: Source +13, Tests +129, Config +2. Total +144 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real reproduction of the original intermittent webchat issue was established in this review. Source review does reproduce a patch regression: the PR removes the runless eventRunId guard and inverts the current test protecting newer local runs.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor and maintainer action is needed before merge: repair the session-state regression, remove or explicitly authorize the dependency change, and add real behavior proof; automation should not take this PR while proof is missing.
